boothPackages.name: TITANIUM Booth
boothPackages.description: The ultimate exhibition presence at 48sqm (8x6x4m). Premium fully customizable booth with top-tier furnishings, a keynote speaking slot, and VIP access for 12 guests. Ideal for headline sponsors seeking maximum brand visibility.

boothPackages.name: DIAMOND Booth
boothPackages.description: A premium 30sqm (6x5x3.5m) customizable booth with extensive furnishings and branding. Includes a keynote speaking slot and VIP access for 8 guests. Perfect for established brokers wanting a commanding presence.

boothPackages.name: PLATINUM Booth
boothPackages.description: An 18sqm (6x3x3.5m) premium pre-built booth with professional branding elements. Includes a counter, brochure stand, roll-up banner, and VIP access for 6 guests.

boothPackages.name: GOLD Booth
boothPackages.description: A 12sqm (4x3x2.5m) standard shell booth with solid furnishings and a 42" TV. Includes seating, brochure stand, roll-up banner, and VIP access for 4 guests.

boothPackages.name: SILVER Booth
boothPackages.description: A 9sqm (3x3x2.5m) standard shell booth with essential amenities. Includes a counter, 42" TV, brochure stand, and VIP access for 3 guests.

boothPackages.name: BRONZE Booth
boothPackages.description: A compact 6sqm (3x2x2.5m) backwall-only booth for brokers seeking an affordable entry point. Includes VIP access for 2 guests.

brandingOpportunities.name: Welcome Bag Sponsor
brandingOpportunities.description: Sponsor the official welcome bags distributed at registration. 2,000 branded bags handed to every attendee upon arrival, ensuring maximum brand exposure from the first moment.

brandingOpportunities.name: Lanyard Sponsor
brandingOpportunities.description: Brand the official event lanyards worn by every attendee. 3,000 branded lanyards attached to all badges, keeping your logo visible throughout the entire event.
features: Worn by all attendees and staff

brandingOpportunities.name: Wristband Sponsor
brandingOpportunities.description: Sponsor the event wristbands worn by all attendees. 3,000 branded wristbands provide constant brand visibility as attendees network and interact throughout the expo.

brandingOpportunities.name: Networking Lounge Sponsor
brandingOpportunities.description: Full branding of the corporate networking lounge where key meetings happen. Your brand wraps the premium lounge area where decision-makers gather for private conversations.
features: Logo on all lounge furniture and signage

brandingOpportunities.name: Water Sponsor
brandingOpportunities.description: Sponsor the hydration stations across the venue. 4 branded water kiosks placed in high-traffic areas ensure your brand is seen every time attendees grab a drink.

brandingOpportunities.name: Registration Sponsor
brandingOpportunities.description: Brand the entire registration area where every attendee checks in. Your logo appears on registration counters, kiosks, and backdrop, guaranteeing first-impression visibility.
features: First brand seen by every attendee

brandingOpportunities.name: Arch Sponsor
brandingOpportunities.description: Exclusive branding on the grand entrance arch. Every attendee walks under your branded arch upon entering the expo hall, creating a memorable first impression.

brandingOpportunities.name: Usher Sponsor
brandingOpportunities.description: Brand the usher staff who guide attendees throughout the venue. 3 branded usher staff wearing your company colors and logo direct traffic across the expo floor.

brandingOpportunities.name: Cover Sponsor
brandingOpportunities.description: Secure the cover of the official expo magazine or catalog. Your brand takes the prime real estate on the front cover distributed to all attendees and industry contacts.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Workshop Sponsorship
advertisingOpportunities.description: Sponsor a dedicated workshop room with full branding and a speaking slot. Host educational sessions under your brand to establish thought leadership and engage directly with attendees.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Candy Girl Sponsor
advertisingOpportunities.description: Branded candy distribution throughout the expo floor. A promotional team distributes branded sweets to attendees, creating a memorable and shareable brand interaction.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Violinist Sponsor
advertisingOpportunities.description: A dedicated violinist performs at or near your booth, drawing foot traffic and creating an elegant atmosphere. Your branding accompanies the performance area.
features: Draws foot traffic to your booth

advertisingOpportunities.name: Galeton Sponsorship
advertisingOpportunities.description: Premium Galeton sponsorship package providing high-visibility branding across the expo. A flagship advertising opportunity with extensive brand placement and recognition.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Premium Qahwa Sponsorship
advertisingOpportunities.description: Sponsor the traditional Arabic coffee service at the expo. Branded Qahwa stations serve premium Arabic coffee to attendees, blending cultural hospitality with your brand presence.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Cloak Room Sponsorship
advertisingOpportunities.description: Brand the cloak room area used by attendees upon arrival and departure. Your brand is the first and last thing attendees see as they store and collect belongings.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Bar Lounge Sponsorship
advertisingOpportunities.description: Sponsor the bar lounge where attendees relax and network over drinks. Full branding of the lounge area including bar counters, seating, and menu displays. Pricing TBA.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Award Ceremony Sponsorship
advertisingOpportunities.description: Sponsor the official award ceremony recognizing top brokers and industry leaders. Your brand is prominently featured during the ceremony, stage, and award materials. Pricing TBA.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Smoking Lounge Sponsorship
advertisingOpportunities.description: Brand the designated smoking lounge area. A high-dwell-time space where attendees spend extended periods, giving your brand prolonged exposure. Pricing TBA.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Welcome Party Sponsor
advertisingOpportunities.description: Sponsor the official welcome party on the eve of the expo. Your brand headlines the kickoff celebration attended by VIPs, speakers, and top-tier brokers. Pricing TBA.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Closing Party Sponsor
advertisingOpportunities.description: Sponsor the official closing party celebrating the end of the expo. Your brand is the final impression as attendees celebrate connections made during the event. Pricing TBA.

advertisingOpportunities.name: Gala Night Sponsorship
advertisingOpportunities.description: Sponsor the prestigious gala night dinner event. An exclusive evening of fine dining and networking, with your brand featured across the venue and program. Pricing TBA.

digitalProducts.name: Virtual Booth Upgrade
digitalProducts.description: Upgrade your virtual booth with enhanced 3D visuals including custom animations, particle effects, and high-resolution textures. Stand out from standard booths with a premium interactive experience that draws more visitors.

digitalProducts.name: AI Chat Agent Pro
digitalProducts.description: Deploy a custom AI chat agent trained on your company-specific data, product offerings, and FAQs. Engage visitors 24/7 with intelligent responses, lead qualification, and unlimited conversation capacity.
features: Custom AI agent trained on your company data

digitalProducts.name: Virtual Billboard
digitalProducts.description: Display an animated billboard in the main virtual exhibition hall with your branding, messaging, and call-to-action. Available in three sizes (small, medium, large) positioned in high-traffic areas of the 3D environment.
features: Click-through to your booth or external URL

digitalProducts.name: Sponsored MT5 Feed
digitalProducts.description: Place your broker logo and call-to-action directly on the live MT5 price feed overlay visible to all visitors. Every time a visitor checks live forex prices, your brand is front and center.
features: Logo on live MT5 price feed overlay

digitalProducts.name: Priority Booth Placement
digitalProducts.description: Secure the most visible booth position at the virtual entrance. Your booth is the first thing every visitor sees when they enter the 3D expo hall, maximizing foot traffic and first impressions.
features: First booth seen by all visitors

digitalProducts.name: Virtual Seminar Slot
digitalProducts.description: Host a 30-minute branded presentation on the virtual seminar stage. Present to the entire online audience with your branding on the stage, slides integration, and live Q&A functionality.

digitalProducts.name: Lead Capture Package
digitalProducts.description: Collect visitor contact details and engagement data from every booth interaction. Capture emails, phone numbers, and interest areas with automated follow-up sequences triggered post-visit.
features: Collect visitor emails and contact details

digitalProducts.name: Virtual Networking Room
digitalProducts.description: A private branded video conferencing room for 1:1 or group meetings within the virtual expo. Schedule and host live video calls with prospects directly from your booth with full branding.

digitalProducts.name: Homepage Banner
digitalProducts.description: Display a prominent banner on the expo landing page seen by every visitor before they enter the 3D hall. Price is per week, with rotation among active banner sponsors. Drives direct traffic to your booth.
features: Click-through to booth or external URL

digitalProducts.name: Push Notification Sponsorship
digitalProducts.description: Send a branded push notification to all connected visitors in the virtual expo. Announce promotions, events, or drive traffic to your booth with a single broadcast message reaching every active user.
features: Branded notification to all connected visitors
Direct link to booth or content
